name: Ricotta Crostini
recipeIngredient: 3 slices turkey bacon, cooked and chopped
24 slices day-old French bread, about 1/4-inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven control to broil.
2. Mix Ricotta Filling ingredients.
3. Spread about 1 tablespoon ricotta mixture on each bread slice.
4. Sprinkle 1/2 teaspoon Parmesan cheese on each bread slice.
5. Broil with tops about 6 inches from heat for about 3 minutes, or until bubbly.
6. Serve hot. Makes 8 servings (3 slices each).
